# BRIK64

BRIK64 provides bounded software verification, PCD/circuit workflows, and
evidence bundles for human and agentic software development.

Important URLs:

- https://brik64.com/for-agents
- https://brik64.com/agentic-commerce
- https://brik64.com/commercial-use
- https://brik64.com/pricing
- https://brik64.com/.well-known/brik64-agent

Agent payment policy:

- Free paths cover discovery, estimates, compatibility summaries and education.
- Paid paths cover bounded verification runs, exportable evidence bundles,
  commercial-use licenses and compliance packages.
- Payment unlocks access; it is not a blanket correctness or formal-proof claim.
